docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SAMICHI SINGH, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPERTER, LINH T. MUSFELT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOUHONG HUA IS PRESENT. DAVID ZHAO, HUSBAND TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE DRIVER OF THE DEFENDANTS VEHICLE IS THE HUSBAND OF DEFENDANT, DAVID ZHAO. DAVID ZHAO STIPULATES THAT HE SHOULD BE NAMED AS A DEFENDANT AND WAIVES THE FILING OF AN AMENDED CLAIM NAMING DAVID ZHAO AS A DEFENDANT AND IS ADDED TO THE SUIT IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGH, SAMICHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHAO, DAVID $883.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $928.00, * SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION ** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUA, YOUHONG ZHAO, DAVID
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY SINGH, SAMICHI AS TO DEFENDANT HUA, YOUHONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUA, YOUHONG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED NOV-12-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUA, YOUHONG
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGH, SAMICHI AS TO DEFENDANT HUA, YOUHONG

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-26-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAMICHI SINGH IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERITIFED INTERPRETER HONG HA. DEFENDANT YOUHONG HUA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-26-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS CONTACTED BY PHONE REGARDING THE CONTINUANCE AND NOT TO APPEAR TODAY. DEFENDANT HAD NOT CONTACT INFORMATION. PLAINTIFF SAMICHI SINGH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOUHONG HUA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. BOTH PARTIES WERE INFORMED OF THE CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
